import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/views/Debug.vue");import * as THREE from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { OrbitControls } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three_examples_jsm_controls_OrbitControls__js.js?v=e69ee2d5"
import { GLTFLoader } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three_examples_jsm_loaders_GLTFLoader__js.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { DRACOLoader } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three_examples_jsm_loaders_DRACOLoader__js.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { RoomEnvironment } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three_addons_environments_RoomEnvironment__js.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { Water } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/three_examples_jsm_objects_Water__js.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { ref, reactive, computed, onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, watch, h } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { RouterLink } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue-router.js?v=5a3be95a"
import { markerConfigs, BP_JACKET_INDEX, SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX } from "/src/includes/markerConfigs.js"

const STORAGE_KEY = 'bp-ar:debug:v1'
const WATER_NORMALS_URL = 'https://threejs.org/examples/textures/waternormals.jpg'


const _sfc_main = {
  __name: 'Debug',
  setup(__props, { expose: __expose }) {
  __expose();

const SliderRow = {
  props: ['label', 'modelValue', 'min', 'max', 'step'],
  emits: ['update:modelValue'],
  setup(props, { emit }) {
    return () => h('label', { class: 'block mb-2' }, [
      h('div', { class: 'flex justify-between text-xs opacity-70 mb-1' }, [
        h('span', props.label),
        h('span', { class: 'tabular-nums' }, Number(props.modelValue).toFixed(4)),
      ]),
      h('input', {
        type: 'range',
        min: props.min, max: props.max, step: props.step,
        value: props.modelValue,
        class: 'w-full accent-emerald-500',
        onInput: (e) => emit('update:modelValue', Number(e.target.value)),
      }),
    ])
  },
}

const ColorRow = {
  props: ['label', 'modelValue'],
  emits: ['update:modelValue'],
  setup(props, { emit }) {
    return () => h('label', { class: 'flex items-center justify-between mb-2 text-xs' }, [
      h('span', { class: 'opacity-70' }, props.label),
      h('div', { class: 'flex items-center gap-2' }, [
        h('span', { class: 'opacity-60 tabular-nums' }, props.modelValue),
        h('input', {
          type: 'color',
          value: props.modelValue,
          class: 'w-8 h-8 rounded bg-transparent cursor-pointer',
          onInput: (e) => emit('update:modelValue', e.target.value),
        }),
      ]),
    ])
  },
}

const canvasHost = ref(null)
const selectedIndex = ref(0)
const loading = ref(false)
const loadError = ref('')
const hint = ref('')

const states = reactive({})

const current = computed(() => states[selectedIndex.value])

const isShipOcean = computed(() => selectedIndex.value === SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX)
const isBpJacket = computed(() => selectedIndex.value === BP_JACKET_INDEX)

function defaultStateFor(index) {
  const base = {
    position: { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 },
    rotation: { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 },
    scale: 0.15,
  }
  if (index === SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX) {
    base.ocean = {
      distortionScale: 1.2,
      alpha: 1.0,
      size: 1.0,
      waterColor: '#0a3d62',
      sunColor: '#ffffff',
      sunDirection: { x: 0.5, y: 1.0, z: 0.2 },
    }
    base.buoyancy = { amplitude: 0.05, speed: 0.0015 }
  }
  if (index === BP_JACKET_INDEX) {
    base.bpJacket = {
      manualRotateSpeed: 0.03,
      autoRotateSpeed: 0.01,
      autoRotateResumeDelay: 1500,
    }
  }
  return base
}

function deepAssign(target, source) {
  for (const key of Object.keys(source)) {
    if (source[key] && typeof source[key] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(source[key]) && target[key]) {
      deepAssign(target[key], source[key])
    } else {
      target[key] = source[key]
    }
  }
  return target
}

function loadStates() {
  let saved = {}
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY)
    saved = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {}
  } catch {}
  markerConfigs.forEach((_, i) => {
    const def = defaultStateFor(i)
    if (saved[i]) deepAssign(def, saved[i])
    states[i] = def
  })
}

function saveStates() {
  try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(states)) } catch {}
}

let renderer, scene, camera, controls, mixer
let currentModel = null
let waterMesh = null
let shipParts = []
let clock = new THREE.Clock()
let raf = null
let resizeObserver = null

function clearScene() {
  if (currentModel) {
    scene.remove(currentModel)
    currentModel.traverse((c) => {
      if (c.isMesh) {
        c.geometry?.dispose?.()
        const m = c.material
        if (Array.isArray(m)) m.forEach((x) => x?.dispose?.())
        else m?.dispose?.()
      }
    })
    currentModel = null
  }
  if (waterMesh) {
    scene.remove(waterMesh)
    waterMesh.material?.dispose?.()
    waterMesh = null
  }
  shipParts = []
  mixer = null
}

let gltfLoader = null
function setupLoader() {
  const draco = new DRACOLoader()
  draco.setDecoderPath('https://www.gstatic.com/draco/versioned/decoders/1.5.7/')
  gltfLoader = new GLTFLoader()
  gltfLoader.setDRACOLoader(draco)
}

function loadModel(index) {
  clearScene()
  loading.value = true
  loadError.value = ''
  const cfg = markerConfigs[index]
  gltfLoader.load(
    cfg.file,
    (gltf) => {
      const model = gltf.scene
      const box = new THREE.Box3().setFromObject(model)
      const center = box.getCenter(new THREE.Vector3())
      model.position.sub(center)

      model.traverse((child) => {
        if (!child.isMesh) return
        const fixMaterial = (src) => {
          if (!src) return src
          if (src.map) src.map.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace
          if (src.emissiveMap) src.emissiveMap.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace
          if (cfg.baked) {
            return new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              map: src.map ?? null,
              color: src.color ? src.color.clone() : new THREE.Color(0xffffff),
              alphaMap: src.alphaMap ?? null,
              transparent: src.transparent ?? false,
              opacity: src.opacity ?? 1,
              side: src.side ?? THREE.FrontSide,
            })
          }
          src.envMapIntensity = 1
          src.needsUpdate = true
          return src
        }
        child.material = Array.isArray(child.material)
          ? child.material.map(fixMaterial)
          : fixMaterial(child.material)
      })

      if (index === SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX) {
        setupShipOcean(model)
      }

      const clips = gltf.animations || []
      if (typeof cfg.clipIndex === 'number' && clips[cfg.clipIndex]) {
        mixer = new THREE.AnimationMixer(model)
        mixer.clipAction(clips[cfg.clipIndex]).play()
      }

      currentModel = model
      scene.add(model)
      applyState()
      loading.value = false
    },
    undefined,
    (err) => {
      loading.value = false
      loadError.value = `Failed to load ${cfg.file}: ${err?.message ?? err}`
    },
  )
}

function setupShipOcean(model) {
  let oceanMesh = null
  const parts = []
  model.traverse((child) => {
    if (!child.isMesh) return
    if (/ocean|water|sea/i.test(child.name)) oceanMesh = child
    else parts.push(child)
  })
  shipParts = parts.map((obj) => ({ obj, baseY: obj.position.y }))

  if (!oceanMesh) {
    const names = []
    model.traverse((c) => { if (c.isMesh) names.push(c.name) })
    console.warn('[debug ship-ocean] no ocean mesh; names:', names)
    return
  }

  const waterNormals = new THREE.TextureLoader().load(WATER_NORMALS_URL, (tex) => {
    tex.wrapS = tex.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping
  })

  const water = new Water(oceanMesh.geometry, {
    textureWidth: 256,
    textureHeight: 256,
    waterNormals,
    sunDirection: new THREE.Vector3(0.5, 1, 0.2).normalize(),
    sunColor: 0xffffff,
    waterColor: 0x0a3d62,
    distortionScale: 1.2,
    fog: false,
  })
  water.position.copy(oceanMesh.position)
  water.rotation.copy(oceanMesh.rotation)
  water.scale.copy(oceanMesh.scale)
  oceanMesh.parent.add(water)
  oceanMesh.parent.remove(oceanMesh)
  waterMesh = water
}

function applyState() {
  const s = current.value
  if (!s) return
  if (currentModel) {
    currentModel.position.set(s.position.x, s.position.y, s.position.z)
    currentModel.rotation.set(s.rotation.x, s.rotation.y, s.rotation.z)
    currentModel.scale.setScalar(s.scale)
  }
  if (waterMesh && s.ocean) {
    const u = waterMesh.material.uniforms
    u.distortionScale.value = s.ocean.distortionScale
    u.alpha.value = s.ocean.alpha
    u.size.value = s.ocean.size
    u.waterColor.value.set(s.ocean.waterColor)
    u.sunColor.value.set(s.ocean.sunColor)
    u.sunDirection.value.set(s.ocean.sunDirection.x, s.ocean.sunDirection.y, s.ocean.sunDirection.z).normalize()
  }
}

function copyJson() {
  const s = current.value
  if (!s) return
  const payload = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(s))
  const text = JSON.stringify({ [selectedIndex.value]: payload }, null, 2)
  navigator.clipboard?.writeText(text).then(
    () => { hint.value = 'Copied to clipboard' },
    () => { hint.value = `Copy failed — value:\n${text}`; console.log(text) },
  )
  setTimeout(() => { hint.value = '' }, 2500)
}

function resetCurrent() {
  states[selectedIndex.value] = defaultStateFor(selectedIndex.value)
  applyState()
}

watch(selectedIndex, (i) => loadModel(i))
watch(current, applyState, { deep: true })
watch(states, saveStates, { deep: true })

function initThree() {
  const host = canvasHost.value
  renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: false })
  renderer.setPixelRatio(window.devicePixelRatio)
  renderer.setSize(host.clientWidth, host.clientHeight)
  renderer.outputColorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace
  renderer.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping
  renderer.toneMappingExposure = 1.2
  host.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

  scene = new THREE.Scene()
  scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x1a1a1a)

  const pmrem = new THREE.PMREMGenerator(renderer)
  pmrem.compileEquirectangularShader()
  scene.environment = pmrem.fromScene(new RoomEnvironment()).texture
  pmrem.dispose()

  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.9))
  const dl = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 1.6)
  dl.position.set(0, 1, 3)
  scene.add(dl)

  scene.add(new THREE.GridHelper(2, 20, 0x444444, 0x222222))
  scene.add(new THREE.AxesHelper(0.3))

  camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, host.clientWidth / host.clientHeight, 0.01, 100)
  camera.position.set(0.6, 0.5, 0.8)

  controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement)
  controls.target.set(0, 0, 0)
  controls.enableDamping = true

  resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    const w = host.clientWidth, h = host.clientHeight
    renderer.setSize(w, h)
    camera.aspect = w / h
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
  })
  resizeObserver.observe(host)
}

function animate() {
  raf = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
  const dt = clock.getDelta()
  const t = performance.now()

  if (mixer) mixer.update(dt * 0.6)

  if (waterMesh) waterMesh.material.uniforms.time.value += dt

  if (shipParts.length && current.value?.buoyancy) {
    const { amplitude, speed } = current.value.buoyancy
    const bob = Math.sin(t * speed) * amplitude
    for (const p of shipParts) p.obj.position.y = p.baseY + bob
  }

  controls.update()
  renderer.render(scene, camera)
}

onMounted(() => {
  loadStates()
  setupLoader()
  initThree()
  loadModel(selectedIndex.value)
  animate()
})

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  if (raf) cancelAnimationFrame(raf)
  resizeObserver?.disconnect()
  clearScene()
  renderer?.dispose?.()
  renderer?.domElement?.parentNode?.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
})

const __returned__ = { STORAGE_KEY, WATER_NORMALS_URL, SliderRow, ColorRow, canvasHost, selectedIndex, loading, loadError, hint, states, current, isShipOcean, isBpJacket, defaultStateFor, deepAssign, loadStates, saveStates, get renderer() { return renderer }, set renderer(v) { renderer = v }, get scene() { return scene }, set scene(v) { scene = v }, get camera() { return camera }, set camera(v) { camera = v }, get controls() { return controls }, set controls(v) { controls = v }, get mixer() { return mixer }, set mixer(v) { mixer = v }, get currentModel() { return currentModel }, set currentModel(v) { currentModel = v }, get waterMesh() { return waterMesh }, set waterMesh(v) { waterMesh = v }, get shipParts() { return shipParts }, set shipParts(v) { shipParts = v }, get clock() { return clock }, set clock(v) { clock = v }, get raf() { return raf }, set raf(v) { raf = v }, get resizeObserver() { return resizeObserver }, set resizeObserver(v) { resizeObserver = v }, clearScene, get gltfLoader() { return gltfLoader }, set gltfLoader(v) { gltfLoader = v }, setupLoader, loadModel, setupShipOcean, applyState, copyJson, resetCurrent, initThree, animate, get THREE() { return THREE }, get OrbitControls() { return OrbitControls }, get GLTFLoader() { return GLTFLoader }, get DRACOLoader() { return DRACOLoader }, get RoomEnvironment() { return RoomEnvironment }, get Water() { return Water }, ref, reactive, computed, onMounted, onBeforeUnmount, watch, h, get RouterLink() { return RouterLink }, get markerConfigs() { return markerConfigs }, get BP_JACKET_INDEX() { return BP_JACKET_INDEX }, get SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX() { return SHIP_OCEAN_INDEX } }
Object.defineProperty(__returned__, '__isScriptSetup', { enumerable: false, value: true })
return __returned__
}

}
import { createElementVNode as _createElementVNode, createTextVNode as _createTextVNode, withCtx as _withCtx, createVNode as _createVNode, renderList as _renderList, Fragment as _Fragment, openBlock as _openBlock, createElementBlock as _createElementBlock, toDisplayString as _toDisplayString, vModelSelect as _vModelSelect, withDirectives as _withDirectives, createCommentVNode as _createCommentVNode } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue.js?v=5a3be95a"

const _hoisted_1 = { class: "fixed inset-0 bg-neutral-900 text-white overflow-hidden" }
const _hoisted_2 = {
  ref: "canvasHost",
  class: "absolute inset-0"
}
const _hoisted_3 = { class: "absolute top-0 right-0 h-full w-80 bg-neutral-900/90 backdrop-blur p-4 overflow-y-auto text-sm shadow-2xl border-l border-neutral-700" }
const _hoisted_4 = { class: "flex items-center justify-between mb-3" }
const _hoisted_5 = ["value"]
const _hoisted_6 = {
  key: 0,
  class: "text-xs opacity-60 mb-3"
}
const _hoisted_7 = {
  key: 1,
  class: "text-xs text-red-400 mb-3"
}
const _hoisted_8 = { class: "mb-4" }
const _hoisted_9 = {
  key: 2,
  class: "mb-4"
}
const _hoisted_10 = {
  key: 3,
  class: "mb-4"
}
const _hoisted_11 = {
  key: 4,
  class: "mb-4"
}
const _hoisted_12 = {
  key: 5,
  class: "text-xs opacity-60 mt-2"
}

function _sfc_render(_ctx, _cache, $props, $setup, $data, $options) {
  return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("main", _hoisted_1, [
    _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_2, null, 512 /* NEED_PATCH */),
    _createElementVNode("aside", _hoisted_3, [
      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_4, [
        _cache[22] || (_cache[22] = _createElementVNode("h1", { class: "font-semibold" }, "AR Debug", -1 /* CACHED */)),
        _createVNode($setup["RouterLink"], {
          to: "/",
          class: "text-xs opacity-70 hover:opacity-100 underline"
        }, {
          default: _withCtx(() => [...(_cache[21] || (_cache[21] = [
            _createTextVNode(" ← Home ", -1 /* CACHED */)
          ]))]),
          _: 1 /* STABLE */
        })
      ]),
      _cache[27] || (_cache[27] = _createElementVNode("label", { class: "block text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-1" }, "Model", -1 /* CACHED */)),
      _withDirectives(_createElementVNode("select", {
        "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[0] || (_cache[0] = $event => (($setup.selectedIndex) = $event)),
        class: "w-full bg-neutral-800 border border-neutral-700 rounded px-2 py-1 mb-4"
      }, [
        (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($setup.markerConfigs, (cfg, i) => {
          return (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("option", {
            key: i,
            value: i
          }, _toDisplayString(i) + " — " + _toDisplayString(cfg.file.replace('/models/', '')), 9 /* TEXT, PROPS */, _hoisted_5))
        }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
      ], 512 /* NEED_PATCH */), [
        [
          _vModelSelect,
          $setup.selectedIndex,
          void 0,
          { number: true }
        ]
      ]),
      ($setup.loading)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("p", _hoisted_6, "Loading…"))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
      ($setup.loadError)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("p", _hoisted_7, _toDisplayString($setup.loadError), 1 /* TEXT */))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
      _createElementVNode("section", _hoisted_8, [
        _cache[23] || (_cache[23] = _createElementVNode("h2", { class: "text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-2" }, "Transform", -1 /* CACHED */)),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Pos X",
          modelValue: $setup.current.position.x,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[1] || (_cache[1] = $event => (($setup.current.position.x) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -2,
          max: 2,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Pos Y",
          modelValue: $setup.current.position.y,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[2] || (_cache[2] = $event => (($setup.current.position.y) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -2,
          max: 2,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Pos Z",
          modelValue: $setup.current.position.z,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[3] || (_cache[3] = $event => (($setup.current.position.z) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -2,
          max: 2,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Rot X",
          modelValue: $setup.current.rotation.x,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[4] || (_cache[4] = $event => (($setup.current.rotation.x) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -Math.PI,
          max: Math.PI,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue", "min", "max"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Rot Y",
          modelValue: $setup.current.rotation.y,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[5] || (_cache[5] = $event => (($setup.current.rotation.y) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -Math.PI,
          max: Math.PI,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue", "min", "max"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Rot Z",
          modelValue: $setup.current.rotation.z,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[6] || (_cache[6] = $event => (($setup.current.rotation.z) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: -Math.PI,
          max: Math.PI,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue", "min", "max"]),
        _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
          label: "Scale",
          modelValue: $setup.current.scale,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[7] || (_cache[7] = $event => (($setup.current.scale) = $event)),
          modelModifiers: { number: true },
          min: 0.01,
          max: 2,
          step: 0.01
        }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"])
      ]),
      ($setup.isShipOcean && $setup.current.ocean)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("section", _hoisted_9, [
            _cache[24] || (_cache[24] = _createElementVNode("h2", { class: "text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-2" }, "Ocean (Water shader)", -1 /* CACHED */)),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Distortion",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.distortionScale,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[8] || (_cache[8] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.distortionScale) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 10,
              step: 0.05
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Alpha",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.alpha,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[9] || (_cache[9] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.alpha) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 1,
              step: 0.01
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Size",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.size,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[10] || (_cache[10] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.size) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0.1,
              max: 10,
              step: 0.1
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["ColorRow"], {
              label: "Water Color",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.waterColor,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[11] || (_cache[11] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.waterColor) = $event))
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["ColorRow"], {
              label: "Sun Color",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.sunColor,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[12] || (_cache[12] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.sunColor) = $event))
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Sun X",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.x,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[13] || (_cache[13] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.x) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: -1,
              max: 1,
              step: 0.01
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Sun Y",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.y,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[14] || (_cache[14] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.y) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: -1,
              max: 1,
              step: 0.01
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Sun Z",
              modelValue: $setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.z,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[15] || (_cache[15] = $event => (($setup.current.ocean.sunDirection.z) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: -1,
              max: 1,
              step: 0.01
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"])
          ]))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
      ($setup.isShipOcean && $setup.current.buoyancy)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("section", _hoisted_10, [
            _cache[25] || (_cache[25] = _createElementVNode("h2", { class: "text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-2" }, "Ship Buoyancy", -1 /* CACHED */)),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Amplitude",
              modelValue: $setup.current.buoyancy.amplitude,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[16] || (_cache[16] = $event => (($setup.current.buoyancy.amplitude) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 0.5,
              step: 0.005
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Speed",
              modelValue: $setup.current.buoyancy.speed,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[17] || (_cache[17] = $event => (($setup.current.buoyancy.speed) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 0.01,
              step: 0.0001
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"])
          ]))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
      ($setup.isBpJacket && $setup.current.bpJacket)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("section", _hoisted_11, [
            _cache[26] || (_cache[26] = _createElementVNode("h2", { class: "text-xs uppercase tracking-wider opacity-60 mb-2" }, "BP Jacket Rotation", -1 /* CACHED */)),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Manual Speed",
              modelValue: $setup.current.bpJacket.manualRotateSpeed,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[18] || (_cache[18] = $event => (($setup.current.bpJacket.manualRotateSpeed) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 0.2,
              step: 0.001
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Auto Speed",
              modelValue: $setup.current.bpJacket.autoRotateSpeed,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[19] || (_cache[19] = $event => (($setup.current.bpJacket.autoRotateSpeed) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 0.1,
              step: 0.001
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"]),
            _createVNode($setup["SliderRow"], {
              label: "Resume Delay (ms)",
              modelValue: $setup.current.bpJacket.autoRotateResumeDelay,
              "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[20] || (_cache[20] = $event => (($setup.current.bpJacket.autoRotateResumeDelay) = $event)),
              modelModifiers: { number: true },
              min: 0,
              max: 5000,
              step: 100
            }, null, 8 /* PROPS */, ["modelValue"])
          ]))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
      _createElementVNode("div", { class: "flex gap-2 mt-4" }, [
        _createElementVNode("button", {
          onClick: $setup.copyJson,
          class: "flex-1 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 rounded py-2 text-xs font-medium"
        }, " Copy JSON "),
        _createElementVNode("button", {
          onClick: $setup.resetCurrent,
          class: "bg-neutral-700 hover:bg-neutral-600 rounded py-2 px-3 text-xs"
        }, " Reset ")
      ]),
      ($setup.hint)
        ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("p", _hoisted_12, _toDisplayString($setup.hint), 1 /* TEXT */))
        : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true)
    ])
  ]))
}

import "/src/views/Debug.vue?vue&type=style&index=0&scoped=35849b35&lang.css"

_sfc_main.__hmrId = "35849b35"
typeof __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__ !== 'undefined' && __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.createRecord(_sfc_main.__hmrId, _sfc_main)
import.meta.hot.on('file-changed', ({ file }) => {
  __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.CHANGED_FILE = file
})
import.meta.hot.accept(mod => {
  if (!mod) return
  const { default: updated, _rerender_only } = mod
  if (_rerender_only) {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.rerender(updated.__hmrId, updated.render)
  } else {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.reload(updated.__hmrId, updated)
  }
})
import _export_sfc from "/@id/__x00__plugin-vue:export-helper"
export default /*#__PURE__*/_export_sfc(_sfc_main, [['render',_sfc_render],['__scopeId',"data-v-35849b35"],['__file',"C:/_repo/bp-ar/src/views/Debug.vue"]])
//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
